couplets.label: K1
couplets.question: Hindwing without white-tipped tail at the end of vein 3 vs. Hindwing with a short white tipped tail at vein 3?
couplets.a_text: Hindwing without white-tipped tail at the end of vein 3. Underside hindwing without spot at the base of space 1a.
couplets.b_text: Hindwing with a short white tipped tail at vein 3. Underside hindwing with a spot at the base of space 1a. Forewing vein 9 very short, arising well beyond the end of vein 10. (abseus group).
couplets.hint: Check the hindwing at vein 3 for a short white-tipped tail: present sends you to the tiny abseus group (2 spp); absent keeps you in the main key. Forewing vein 9 is also very short in abseus.
couplets.guide_phrase: tail at the end of vein 3
couplets.statement: Hindwing with white-tipped tail at the end of vein 3.

couplets.label: K2
couplets.question: Underside forewing with cell spots outlined greenish silver vs. Hindwing cell about half length of wing or longer?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing with cell spots outlined greenish silver. (centaurus group). Hindwing cell short, much less than half the wing in both sexes.
couplets.b_text: Hindwing cell about half length of wing or longer. Underside forewing cell spots not outlined greenish silver.
couplets.hint: The tell is on the underside forewing cell: if the cell spots are outlined in greenish silver you are in the centaurus group (3 spp, large butterflies with a short hindwing cell). No silver edging and a hindwing cell about half the wing or longer means No.

couplets.label: K3
couplets.question: Underside forewing postdiscal band continuous and costal spot in space 10 present vs. Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 4 shifted outwards out of line with those above and below it?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing postdiscal band continuous and costal spot in space 10 present.
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 4 shifted outwards out of line with those above and below it; no costal spot in space 10; dark patch under cell in upper part of space 1a extends to postdiscal band. ♂ upperside shining blue with broad borders 3.0 mm wide at the forewing tornus increasing to 5.0 mm at apex. ♀ lighter blue. Fwl 27.0 mm. South Myanmar. ... Arhopala amantes
couplets.hint: Yes needs a continuous forewing postdiscal band AND a costal spot in space 10. No identifies A. amantes: its space-4 postdiscal spot is shifted outwards out of line, it has no space-10 costal spot, and a dark patch under the cell reaches the band.

couplets.label: K4
couplets.question: Hindwing tornus rounded, tornal lobe vestigial vs. Hindwing with tornal lobe?
couplets.a_text: Hindwing tornus rounded, tornal lobe vestigial. ♂ upperside violet blue, border a thread; ♀ purple-blue. ... Arhopala centaurus
couplets.b_text: Hindwing with tornal lobe. ♂ upperside shining blue, tinged with violet towards the wing apices; forewing border a thread at tornus increasing to 1.0 mm at apex. ♀ blue. Fwl 27 mm. Sumatra and Java. ... Arhopala araxes
couplets.hint: Separates two centaurus-group species by the hindwing tornus. Yes = A. centaurus (Dull Oak-blue): tornus rounded, tornal lobe vestigial. No = A. araxes: a distinct tornal lobe is present (male also violet-tinged towards the apices). Forewing length 28-29 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K5
couplets.question: Underside both wings with a bar at end of cell vs. Underside without bar at end-cell on forewing, and sometimes none on hindwing?
couplets.a_text: Underside both wings with a bar at end of cell.
couplets.b_text: Underside without bar at end-cell on forewing, and sometimes none on hindwing; markings usually confined to obscure postdiscal and submarginal fasciae and a few obscure spots near the base of the hindwing. Tailless. ♂ upperside shining violet blue, border a thread. ♀ more violet. Fwl 18.0 mm. (fulla group). ... Arhopala fulla
couplets.hint: Look for a dark bar closing the cell on the underside of both wings. No identifies A. fulla (Spotless Oakblue): a small tailless species whose markings shrink to obscure postdiscal fasciae and a few faint basal hindwing spots, with no forewing end-cell bar.

couplets.label: K6
couplets.question: Underside hindwing postdiscal spots in spaces 7, 6 and 5 in echelon, and with their centres more or less in line vs. Underside hindwing with the postdiscal spots in spaces 7, 6 and 5 with their centres widely out of line?
couplets.a_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal spots in spaces 7, 6 and 5 in echelon, and with their centres more or less in line; the spot in space 6 nearer the spot in space 5 than the end-cell bar (except in epimuta and agesilaus groups).
couplets.b_text: Underside hindwing with the postdiscal spots in spaces 7, 6 and 5 with their centres widely out of line; the spot in space 6 with its inner edge in line with, or inside, the inner edge of the spot in space 7, and usually touching or overlapping the end-cell bar (except in A. ace and A. azinis).
couplets.hint: Judge the underside hindwing postdiscal spots 7, 6 and 5. Yes = they sit in echelon with centres roughly in line, spot 6 closer to spot 5 than to the end-cell bar. No = spots widely out of line, spot 6 pulled inward towards spot 7 and touching the end-cell bar.

couplets.label: K7
couplets.question: Underside forewing with a subcostal spot above central cell spot in mid-space 11 and/or at base of space 10 vs. Underside forewing without spot above central cell spot in spaces 11 and 10 (except rarely in space 10 in A?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing with a subcostal spot above central cell spot in mid-space 11 and/or at base of space 10.
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing without spot above central cell spot in spaces 11 and 10 (except rarely in space 10 in A. hellada and A. aedias).
couplets.hint: Check the underside forewing above the central cell spot for a subcostal spot in mid-space 11 and/or at the base of space 10. Yes advances a small set (7 spp); No is the larger branch (note space 10 can rarely show a spot in hellada and aedias).

couplets.label: K8
couplets.question: Hindwing tailless vs. Hindwing tailed?
couplets.a_text: Hindwing tailless. ♂♀ upperside alike; shining, rather powdery blue, with forewing border about 1.5 mm at tornus expanding to mid-costa, and hindwing border 1.5 mm. (agesias group).
couplets.b_text: Hindwing tailed. Sexual dimorphism marked.
couplets.hint: Yes = the tailless agesias group: sexes alike, powdery blue above with a broad forewing border widening to mid-costa. No = a tailed hindwing with marked sexual dimorphism. Tail presence and whether the sexes match are the quickest checks. Forewing length 18.0-23.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K9
couplets.question: Underside forewing without postdiscal band vs. Underside forewing postdiscal band present, as usual?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing without postdiscal band. ... Arhopala similis
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing postdiscal band present, as usual.
couplets.hint: Yes identifies A. similis (Druce's Oakblue), the one agesias-group member lacking a forewing postdiscal band; its underside is uniform hair brown with bold rounded spots. No means a normal postdiscal band is present, sending you on to agesias/kinabala.

couplets.label: K10
couplets.question: Underside hair brown, spots rounded vs. Underside with large, blackish brown markings?
couplets.a_text: Underside hair brown, spots rounded; forewing with single spot in space 11. ... Arhopala agesias
couplets.b_text: Underside with large, blackish brown markings; on forewing postdiscal spot in space 3 elongate and touching end-cell bar; on hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 elongate and overlapping end-cell bar. Forewing with two spots in space 11. ... Arhopala kinabala
couplets.hint: Separates A. agesias (Yes) from A. kinabala (Golden-spotted Oakblue, No). agesias: hair brown, rounded spots, a single spot in space 11. kinabala: larger blackish markings, two spots in space 11, and elongate spots touching/overlapping the end-cell bars.

couplets.label: K11
couplets.question: Underside forewing without spot at base of space 10 vs. Underside forewing with a spot at base of space 10?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing without spot at base of space 10; hindwing with a spot at base of space 6. ♂ upperside pale blue with the forewing border running along the costa to the base. (ijanensis group). ... Arhopala ijanensis
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing with a spot at base of space 10; hindwing without spot at base of space 6.
couplets.hint: Yes identifies A. ijanensis (White-banded Oakblue): no spot at the base of forewing space 10 but a spot at the base of hindwing space 6, plus a diagnostic whitish streak running from the dorsum base to the apex. No has the reverse spot arrangement. Forewing length 23.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K12
couplets.question: Underside forewing postdiscal band only partially dislocated at vein 4 vs. Underside forewing with the postdiscal band completely dislocated at vein 4, with the spots in spaces 4, 5 and 6 in line and oblique?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing postdiscal band only partially dislocated at vein 4. (anthelus group).
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing with the postdiscal band completely dislocated at vein 4, with the spots in spaces 4, 5 and 6 in line and oblique. ♂ upperside shining, pale silvery blue overlaid violet towards costa and termen of both wings; border a thread. ♀ violet blue. Fwl 30.0 mm. (camdeo group, camdeo subgroup).... Arhopala anarte
couplets.hint: Gauge how far the underside forewing postdiscal band is dislocated at vein 4. Yes = only partially dislocated (anthelus group). No identifies A. anarte: band completely dislocated, spots 4, 5 and 6 in line and oblique; a very large silvery-blue camdeo-group species.
couplets.question_phrase: postdiscal band completely dislocated at vein 4

couplets.label: K13
couplets.question: Underside forewing with three spots in space 11 vs. Underside forewing without spots in space 11?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing with three spots in space 11; hindwing with two spots at base of space 8. ♂ upperside brilliant shining blue with narrow border. ♀ violet blue. (anthelus group; anthelus subgroup). ... Arhopala anthelus
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing without spots in space 11; hindwing with only a single spot at base of space 8, as usual. ♂ upperside shining dark blue, border 0.5 mm. Fwl 22.0 mm. (anthelus group; achelous subgroup)....Arhopala achelous
couplets.hint: Separates A. anthelus (Magnificent Oakblue, Yes) from A. achelous (No). anthelus: three spots in forewing space 11 and two spots at the base of hindwing space 8. achelous: no space-11 spots, a single spot at base of space 8, and clearly smaller. Forewing length 28.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K14
couplets.question: Underside forewing with a dark area under the cell outwardly defined by a pale line normally stretching right across space 1b vs. Underside hindwing with the postdiscal spot in space 6 overlapping, or closer to, the spot in space 5 than to the end-cell bar?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing with a dark area under the cell outwardly defined by a pale line normally stretching right across space 1b; often with a spot at extreme base of space 3.
couplets.b_text: Underside hindwing with the postdiscal spot in space 6 overlapping, or closer to, the spot in space 5 than to the end-cell bar.
couplets.hint: Yes routes exclusively into the camdeo group: a dark area under the forewing cell, bounded outwardly by a pale line running right across space 1b, often with a spot at the extreme base of space 3. Every species reachable from Yes belongs to that group (listed below). No takes the other route — keying instead on the hindwing spot-6 position (spot 6 overlapping, or nearer to, spot 5 than the end-cell bar) — and leads to the amphimuta, hypomuta and aedias groups.

hint_group.label: camdeo group — species reached by answering Yes

couplets.label: K15
couplets.question: Underside hindwing without spot mid-space 8 nor at extreme base of space 6 vs. Underside hindwing either with a spot mid-space 8 or at extreme base of space 6?
couplets.a_text: Underside hindwing without spot mid-space 8 nor at extreme base of space 6.
couplets.b_text: Underside hindwing either with a spot mid-space 8 or at extreme base of space 6.
couplets.hint: Scan the underside hindwing for a spot mid-space 8 or at the extreme base of space 6. Yes = both absent (advances a set of 8 spp). No = at least one of those spots present.

couplets.label: K16
couplets.question: Underside forewing postdiscal band continued into space 9 vs. Underside forewing postdiscal band ends at vein 7?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing postdiscal band continued into space 9. Sexual dimorphism marked.
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing postdiscal band ends at vein 7. ♂ ♀ upperside alike, with broad borders expanding on forewing to about 5.0 mm at costa. Fwl 18.0-20.0 mm.
couplets.hint: Yes = the underside forewing postdiscal band continues into space 9, with marked sexual dimorphism. No = the band stops at vein 7, and the sexes are alike with broad borders widening to about 5 mm at the costa (forewing 18-20 mm).

couplets.label: K17
couplets.question: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 4 in line, or on an even curve, with the spots in spaces 5 and 6 vs. Underside forewing with postdiscal spot in space 4 shifted distad out of line with spots in spaces 5 and 6?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 4 in line, or on an even curve, with the spots in spaces 5 and 6.
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing with postdiscal spot in space 4 shifted distad out of line with spots in spaces 5 and 6. Hindwing tail short, about 2.5 mm. ♂ upperside shining violet blue, border a thread. ♀ purplish blue. Fwl 28.0 mm. ...Arhopala hellada
couplets.hint: Check the underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 4 against those in spaces 5 and 6. Yes = it lies in line or on an even curve with them. No identifies A. hellada (long-banded Oakblue): spot 4 shifted outwards out of line, with a short tail about 2.5 mm.
couplets.guide_phrase: postdiscal spot in space 4 shifted distad
couplets.question_phrase: postdiscal spot in space 4 shifted distad

couplets.label: K18
couplets.question: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 9 in continuation of those in spaces 4, 5 and 6 vs. Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 9 shifted basad out of line with those in spaces 4, 5 and 6?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 9 in continuation of those in spaces 4, 5 and 6. Hindwing tail short, about 1.5 mm long. ♂ upperside pale, metallic, silvery blue, with forewing border a thread at tornus increasing to 1.0 mm at apex. ♀ pale sky blue. ...Arhopala varro
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 9 shifted basad out of line with those in spaces 4, 5 and 6. Tail long, about 4-6 mm.
couplets.hint: Yes identifies A. varro: the forewing postdiscal spot in space 9 continues the line of spots 4, 5 and 6, and the tail is very short (about 1.5 mm); upperside pale metallic silvery blue. No = spot 9 shifted basad out of line and a long tail (4-6 mm). Forewing length 20.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K19
couplets.question: Underside ground colour mostly white vs. Underside uniform grey brown to hair brown?
couplets.a_text: Underside ground colour mostly white. ♂ ♀ pale greyish blue, whitish about end-cell. ...Arhopala dispar
couplets.b_text: Underside uniform grey brown to hair brown.
couplets.hint: Yes identifies A. dispar: underside ground colour mostly white, whitish about the end-cell, with a notably long tail (4-6 mm). No = a uniform grey-brown to hair-brown underside, continuing to the rest of the camdeo subgroup. Forewing length 25.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K20
couplets.question: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 smaller than that in space 7 vs. Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 as large as, or larger than, the spot in space 7?
couplets.a_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 smaller than that in space 7; central spot in space 1b elongate; lower half of end-cell bar enlarged outwards.
couplets.b_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 as large as, or larger than, the spot in space 7; central spot in space 1b not unusually elongate; lower end of end-cell bar not often enlarged outwards. ♂ upperside pale violet blue with a greyish tinge, border a thread. ♀ darker blue. Fwl 22.0-26.0 mm. ...Arhopala opalina
couplets.hint: This splits the camdeo subgroup. Yes advances towards A. camdana / A. semperi; No identifies A. opalina (Opal Oakblue), whose hindwing spot 6 is as large as or larger than spot 7, with the space-1b spot not elongate and the end-cell bar not bulged outwards.

couplets.label: K21
couplets.question: ♂ upperside rather pale, clear violet blue, forewing border 0.5 mm, scarcely increasing towards the apex vs. ♂ upperside deep, dull bluish purple, forewing border increasing to 1.25 mm at apex?
couplets.a_text: ♂ upperside rather pale, clear violet blue, forewing border 0.5 mm, scarcely increasing towards the apex. ♀ pale purple blue, hindwing border narrow. ...Arhopala camdana
couplets.b_text: ♂ upperside deep, dull bluish purple, forewing border increasing to 1.25 mm at apex. ♀ purple, whitish at end-cell. Fwl 28.0 mm....Arhopala semperi
couplets.hint: The underside is near-identical, so use size. Yes = A. camdana (small, forewing ~21 mm, upperside pale clear violet blue); No = A. semperi (large, ~28 mm, deep dull bluish purple, female whitish at the end-cell). Forewing length alone usually settles it. Forewing length 21.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K22
couplets.question: Hindwing with a short tail vs. Hindwing tailless?
couplets.a_text: Hindwing with a short tail. Upperside violet blue. ...Arhopala johoreana
couplets.b_text: Hindwing tailless. Upperside much paler blue, tinged violet.... Arhopala belphoebe
couplets.hint: Both are camdeo-group with the forewing postdiscal band ending at vein 7. Yes = A. johoreana (short tail at vein 2, darker violet blue); No = A. belphoebe, tailless and much paler violet blue with the sexes alike. Check for the tail and the upperside tone.

couplets.label: K23
couplets.question: Underside hindwing without spot mid-space 8 vs. Underside hindwing with spot mid-space 8?
couplets.a_text: Underside hindwing without spot mid-space 8. Underside crimson brown with markings outlined by white striae; hindwing central and outer spots in space 7 conjoined at their upper ends. (camdeo group; myrzala subgroup).
couplets.b_text: Underside hindwing with spot mid-space 8; without spot at extreme base of space 6. Underside purple brown with markings outlined by whitish striae; hindwing central and outer spots in space 7 separate. ♂ upperside dark violet blue, border regular, 2.0 mm wide. (camdeo group; bazaloides subgroup). ... Arhopala bazaloides
couplets.hint: Yes keeps to the myrzala subgroup (A. myrzala / myrzalina): crimson-brown, no spot mid-space 8, and the two space-7 spots conjoined at their upper ends. No = A. bazaloides, purple-brown with a spot mid-space 8, a unique extra spot in space 8, and separate space-7 spots.

couplets.label: K24
couplets.question: Hindwing tailed vs. Hindwing tailless?
couplets.a_text: Hindwing tailed. ♂ upperside border narrow. ... Arhopala myrzala
couplets.b_text: Hindwing tailless. ♂ upperside forewing border 1.5 mm at tornus expanding to 4.0 mm at costa. ♀ similar. Fwl 16.0 mm. ... Arhopala myrzalina
couplets.hint: Both are crimson-brown myrzala-subgroup; the tail decides. Yes = A. myrzala (Malayan Oakblue), tailed at vein 2, ~21 mm, narrow border. No = A. myrzalina, tailless and small (~16 mm) with broad borders and spot 6 touching or overlapping the end-cell bar. Forewing length 21.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K25
couplets.question: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 4 shifted distad out of line with the spots in spaces 5 and 6 vs. Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 4 in continuation of the spots in spaces 5 and 6 (occasionally slightly shifted out in amphimuta group, muta subgroup)?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 4 shifted distad out of line with the spots in spaces 5 and 6.
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 4 in continuation of the spots in spaces 5 and 6 (occasionally slightly shifted out in amphimuta group, muta subgroup).
couplets.hint: On the forewing underside, check whether the postdiscal spot in space 4 sits outside the line of the spots in spaces 5 and 6. Yes narrows to 5 species; No is the larger 21-species branch. Note it can be only slightly shifted in the amphimuta group, muta subgroup.
couplets.guide_phrase: postdiscal spot in space 4 shifted distad
couplets.question_phrase: postdiscal spot in space 4 shifted distad

couplets.label: K26
couplets.question: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 nearer to the postdiscal spot in space 5 than to the end-cell bar vs. Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 placed about midway between the spot in space 5 and the end-cell bar?
couplets.a_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 nearer to the postdiscal spot in space 5 than to the end-cell bar. ♂ upperside forewing no contrasting discal patch.
couplets.b_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 placed about midway between the spot in space 5 and the end-cell bar. ♂ upperside forewing with a discal patch contrasting feebly with the rest of the wing. (epimuta group).
couplets.hint: Judge where hindwing spot 6 sits between spot 5 and the end-cell bar. Yes (nearer spot 5, and no forewing discal patch) heads to A. hypomuta / A. aedias; No is the epimuta group, with spot 6 about midway and a feeble upperside discal patch.

couplets.label: K27
couplets.question: Hindwing tailless vs. Hindwing tailed?
couplets.a_text: Hindwing tailless. Underside spots small and rounded; nearly always with a spot at extreme base of space 6 on the hindwing. ♂ upperside rich, shining violet blue, border a thread. ♀ deep blue. (hypomuta group). ... Arhopala hypomuta
couplets.b_text: Hindwing tailed. Underside hindwing without spot at base of space 6. ♂ upperside lustrous violet blue, border a thread. ♀ purple blue. Occurs in two forms: large, fwl 25.0-29.0 mm; small, fwl 20.0-22.0 mm. (aedias group). ... Arhopala aedias
couplets.hint: Tail and the basal spot in space 6 decide. Yes = A. hypomuta (Violet Oakblue), tailless with small rounded spots and a spot at the base of space 6. No = A. aedias (Large Metallic Oakblue), tailed with a long ~6 mm tail and no basal spot in space 6. Forewing length 19.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K28
couplets.question: Hindwing tailless vs. Hindwing tailed?
couplets.a_text: Hindwing tailless. ... Arhopala epimuta
couplets.b_text: Hindwing tailed.
couplets.hint: All three are epimuta-group (faint discal patch, spot 6 midway); the tail decides. Yes = A. epimuta (Tailless Disc Oakblue). No, if a filamentous tail is present at vein 2, advances to A. atosia / A. lurida. Forewing length 22.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K29
couplets.question: ♂ upperside forewing discal patch large, oval, extending to apex of cell and almost to vein 1 vs. ♂ upperside forewing discal patch smaller, almost confined to the bases of spaces 2 and 3, border increasing to about 1.0 mm at apex?
couplets.a_text: ♂ upperside forewing discal patch large, oval, extending to apex of cell and almost to vein 1; border a thread. ... Arhopala atosia
couplets.b_text: ♂ upperside forewing discal patch smaller, almost confined to the bases of spaces 2 and 3, border increasing to about 1.0 mm at apex. Underside markings better defined and darker than in A. atosia. Fwl 19.0-21.0 mm. ... Arhopala lurida
couplets.hint: Yes = A. atosia (Tailed Disc Oakblue), with a large oval discal patch reaching the cell apex. No = A. lurida (Lesser Disc Oakblue), smaller patch and, usefully on an underside, darker and better-defined markings; also a little smaller (~19-21 mm). Forewing length 22.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K30
couplets.question: Underside hindwing with the postdiscal spot in space 6 roughly mid-way between the spot in space 5 and the end-cell bar vs. Underside hindwing with the postdiscal spot in space 6 overlapping, or closer to, the spot in space 5 than to the end-cell bar?
couplets.a_text: Underside hindwing with the postdiscal spot in space 6 roughly mid-way between the spot in space 5 and the end-cell bar. Hindwing tailless. (agesilaus group).
couplets.b_text: Underside hindwing with the postdiscal spot in space 6 overlapping, or closer to, the spot in space 5 than to the end-cell bar.
couplets.hint: Look at hindwing spot 6 relative to spot 5 and the end-cell bar. Yes = agesilaus group (spot 6 roughly midway, tailless) leading to A. agesilaus / A. avatha. No = spot 6 overlapping or closer to spot 5. Field photos can look more displaced than the midway ideal.

couplets.label: K31
couplets.question: Underside forewing with basal cell spot, as usual vs. Underside forewing without basal cell spot?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing with basal cell spot, as usual. ♂ upperside rich violet blue; forewing border 2.0 mm at tornus increasing to 4.0 mm at apex. ♀ bluer. ... Arhopala agesilaus
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing without basal cell spot. ♂ upperside very dark bluish violet; border about 1.0 mm at tornus increasing to 2.0 mm at apex. ♀ purple. Fwl 16.0 mm. ... Arhopala avatha
couplets.hint: Both are small tailless agesilaus-group; check the forewing basal cell spot. Yes = A. agesilaus (basal cell spot present, ~20 mm, rich violet blue). No = A. avatha (no basal cell spot, smaller ~16 mm, very dark bluish violet). Forewing length 20.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K32
couplets.question: Hindwing tailed vs. Hindwing tailless?
couplets.a_text: Hindwing tailed.
couplets.b_text: Hindwing tailless.
couplets.hint: Simply whether the hindwing bears a tail at vein 2. Yes leads to the tailed pair A. allata / A. delta; No continues the larger tailless branch (17 species).

couplets.label: K33
couplets.question: Forewing apex acute and termen straight between veins 2 and 4 vs. Forewing rounded?
couplets.a_text: Forewing apex acute and termen straight between veins 2 and 4. Underside forewing postdiscal band sinuous or slightly dislocated at vein 4; hindwing postdiscal spots in spaces 7 and 6 narrow and roughly rectangular. ♂ upperside dark purple with forewing border 0.5 mm at tornus expanding to 1.5 mm at apex. ♀ dark, shining blue. (oenea group). ... Arhopala allata
couplets.b_text: Forewing rounded. Underside forewing postdiscal band nearly completely dislocated at vein 4; hindwing postdiscal spots in spaces 7 and 6 more or less rounded. ♂ upperside deep violet, with narrow regular border. ♀ purple. Fwl 20.0 mm. (amphimuta group, amphimuta subgroup).... Arhopala delta
couplets.hint: Yes = A. allata (Rosy Oakblue): acute forewing apex, straight termen, and narrow, roughly rectangular hindwing spots 7 and 6. No = A. delta (Deltal Dull Oakblue): rounded forewing, forewing band almost fully dislocated at vein 4, and rounded hindwing spots. Forewing length 22.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K34
couplets.question: Hindwing cilia with a small white spot in space 1a and a very weak tooth at vein 2 vs. Hindwing cilia with white spot in space 1a absent or, rarely, present but very obscure?
couplets.a_text: Hindwing cilia with a small white spot in space 1a and a very weak tooth at vein 2. ♂ valva unilobate.
couplets.b_text: Hindwing cilia with white spot in space 1a absent or, rarely, present but very obscure.
couplets.hint: Look in the hindwing cilia near the tornus for a small white spot in space 1a (plus a very weak tooth at vein 2). Yes narrows to 4 species; No (spot absent or obscure) goes to the 13-species branch. In practice only A. norda and A. moolaiana reliably show this spot.

couplets.label: K35
couplets.question: Underside hindwing postdiscal band partially dislocated at vein 2 vs. Underside hindwing postdiscal band more or less dislocated at vein 2?
couplets.a_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal band partially dislocated at vein 2
couplets.b_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal band more or less dislocated at vein 2. ♂ upperside dark violet blue, forewing border 0.75 mm at tornus expanding to 1.25 mm at apex. ♀ purple with large black borders but not yet recorded in the Malay Peninsula. Fwl 18.0-20.0 mm. ... Arhopala sceva
couplets.hint: Both concern how far the hindwing postdiscal band is broken at vein 2. Yes (only partially dislocated) advances among 3 species; No = A. sceva, where the band is more strongly dislocated at vein 2.

couplets.label: K36
couplets.question: ♂ upperside forewing border regular, under 1.0 mm wide vs. ♂ upperside forewing border expands from 2.0 mm at tornus to 3.0 mm at apex?
couplets.a_text: ♂ upperside forewing border regular, under 1.0 mm wide.
couplets.b_text: ♂ upperside forewing border expands from 2.0 mm at tornus to 3.0 mm at apex. Fwl 20.0-21.0 mm. Distinguished from A. major by presence of a small white patch on hindwing cilia just above tornal lobe and by less rounded postdiscal spots. ... Arhopala norda
couplets.hint: A male upperside character. Yes (forewing border regular, under 1 mm) heads to A. moolaiana / A. dajagaka. No = A. norda (Langkawi Yellow Oakblue), border widening 2 to 3 mm; also told by a white patch on the hindwing cilia above the tornal lobe and less rounded spots.

couplets.label: K37
couplets.question: ♂ upperside shining blue to violet blue, border a thread vs. ♂ upperside dark bluish purple, border 0.5 mm?
couplets.a_text: ♂ upperside shining blue to violet blue, border a thread. ♀ hindwing border narrow, usually only about 1.0 mm between veins 2 and 6. Wings quadrate. ... Arhopala moolaiana
couplets.b_text: ♂ upperside dark bluish purple, border 0.5 mm. ♀ purple, hindwing border at least 2.0 mm wide. Fwl 21.0-25.0 mm. Very difficult to separate from A. amphimuta without dissection of male genitalia. Borneo. ... Arhopala dajagaka
couplets.hint: Hard to split; the upperside or genitalia help. Yes = A. moolaiana (Pale Yellow Oakblue), shining blue with the female hindwing border only ~1 mm. No = A. dajagaka (Bornean, dark bluish purple, female border at least 2 mm), often needing genitalia to separate from A. amphimuta. Forewing length 18.0-22.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K38
couplets.question: Hindwing cilia very weakly toothed at vein 2 vs. ♂ valva unilobate?
couplets.a_text: Hindwing cilia very weakly toothed at vein 2; postdiscal band partially dislocated at vein 2.
couplets.b_text: ♂ valva unilobate. ♂ upperside very dark purple blue, border 0.5 mm. ♀ purple blue, borders narrower than usual. Fwl 18.0-20.0 mm. Very difficult to separate from small individuals of A. amphimuta without dissection of male genitalia. Borneo. ... Arhopala baluensis
couplets.hint: Both leads continue to key 73; the No lead describes A. baluensis, a Bornean insect very hard to separate from small A. amphimuta without dissecting the male genitalia (unilobate valva). Its cilia usually lack the white spot in space 1a and are only weakly toothed at vein 2.

couplets.label: K39
couplets.question: ♂ valva unilobate vs. valva bilobate?
couplets.a_text: ♂ valva unilobate. ♂ upperside very dark purple blue, border 0.5 mm. ♀ purple blue, borders narrower than usual. Very difficult to separate from small individuals of A. amphimuta without dissection of male genitalia. Borneo. ... Arhopala baluensis
couplets.b_text: valva bilobate.
couplets.hint: Yes identifies A. baluensis, a Bornean endemic whose underside is essentially inseparable from a small A. amphimuta. Separation relies on the unilobate male valva (dissection) or the dark purple-blue upperside with a fine 0.5 mm border — not judgeable from an underside photo alone. Forewing length 18.0-20.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K40
couplets.question: ♂ upperside dark bluish purple, border 0.5-1.0 mm vs. ♂ upperside violet blue, forewing border 2.0 mm at tornus expanding to 3.0 mm at apex?
couplets.a_text: ♂ upperside dark bluish purple, border 0.5-1.0 mm. ♀ bluer. ... Arhopala amphimuta
couplets.b_text: ♂ upperside violet blue, forewing border 2.0 mm at tornus expanding to 3.0 mm at apex. ♀ bluer than amphimuta. Fwl 20.0-21.0 mm. ... Arhopala major
couplets.hint: Yes identifies A. amphimuta (Broad Yellow Oakblue), a large tailless species. Its underside barely differs from A. major (No side); the split is upperside — amphimuta warm violet-purple with a narrow 0.5-1 mm border, major bluer with a 2-3 mm border. CD-limited from an underside-only photo. Forewing length 20.0-23.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K41
couplets.question: ♂ upperside violet blue, forewing border 2.0 mm at tornus expanding to 3.0 mm at apex vs. Hindwing cilia without a trace of a tooth at vein 2?
couplets.a_text: ♂ upperside violet blue, forewing border 2.0 mm at tornus expanding to 3.0 mm at apex. ♀ bluer than amphimuta. ... Arhopala major
couplets.b_text: Hindwing cilia without a trace of a tooth at vein 2.
couplets.hint: Yes identifies A. major (Major Yellow Oakblue) — violet-blue above with a border widening from 2 mm at the tornus to 3 mm at the apex. The character is a weak hindwing tooth at vein 2 (inconspicuous when worn); No, with no trace of a tooth, moves to the rounded-hindwing species. Forewing length 20.0-21.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K42
couplets.question: Underside hindwing postdiscal band partially dislocated at vein 2 (but character not absolutely constant in A vs. Underside hindwing postdiscal band completely dislocated at vein 2?
couplets.a_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal band partially dislocated at vein 2 (but character not absolutely constant in A. alica).
couplets.b_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal band completely dislocated at vein 2.
couplets.hint: Splits the tailless amphimuta group by the hindwing postdiscal band. Partially dislocated (Yes) = the spot in space 2 is only slightly stepped from the spot in space 1b; completely dislocated (No) = the band is fully broken into two offset portions at vein 2. Not absolutely constant in A. alica.

couplets.label: K43
couplets.question: ♂ upperside shining blue with a slight violet tinge, border 1.0 mm vs. ♂ upperside dark, dull purple, border a thread?
couplets.a_text: ♂ upperside shining blue with a slight violet tinge, border 1.0 mm. ♀ paler blue, all borders narrower than usual. ... Arhopala zylda
couplets.b_text: ♂ upperside dark, dull purple, border a thread. ♀ purple. Fwl 17.0 mm. Borneo. ... Arhopala alica
couplets.hint: Yes identifies A. zylda — small (FW 16-17 mm) with clear quadrate, banded underside spots and no tooth at vein 2. No leads to A. alica, whose underside markings are almost entirely suppressed (diagnostic). The stated shining-blue vs dull-purple difference is an upperside character. Forewing length 16.0-17.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K44
couplets.question: ♂ upperside dark, dull purple, border a thread vs. ♂ upperside rather dull bluish purple, border 2.0 mm?
couplets.a_text: ♂ upperside dark, dull purple, border a thread. ♀ purple. Borneo. ... Arhopala alica
couplets.b_text: ♂ upperside rather dull bluish purple, border 2.0 mm. ♀ bluer. Fwl 16.5 mm. ... Arhopala stubbsi
couplets.hint: Yes identifies A. alica, a Bornean species with underside markings almost entirely absent (only a faint trace of the HW postdiscal band) and a thread-thin border. No leads to A. stubbsi, which shows normal quadrate/banded spots and a much wider 2 mm upperside border. Forewing length 17.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K45
couplets.question: ♂ upperside rather dull bluish purple, border 2.0 mm vs. Underside hindwing postdiscal band completely dislocated at vein 2?
couplets.a_text: ♂ upperside rather dull bluish purple, border 2.0 mm. ♀ bluer. ... Arhopala stubbsi
couplets.b_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal band completely dislocated at vein 2.
couplets.hint: Yes identifies A. stubbsi, small (FW ~16.5 mm), separated from the similar A. zylda and A. alica mainly by its much broader 2 mm upperside border (reduced to a thread in those two). Its underside has normal quadrate/banded spots, so the border character needs an upperside view.

couplets.label: K46
couplets.question: Underside forewing without basal spot in cell vs. Underside forewing with a basal spot in cell, as usual?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing without basal spot in cell; hindwing postdiscal spots rounded and submarginal lunules darker and better defined than usual. ♂ upperside violet blue, border 1.0 mm; ♀ bluer. ... Arhopala avathina
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing with a basal spot in cell, as usual.
couplets.hint: Yes identifies A. avathina (Lunulate Yellow Oakblue). Check the forewing cell base — avathina uniquely lacks the basal spot in the cell. Its hindwing also shows rounded postdiscal spots and darker, better-defined submarginal lunules; No (basal cell spot present, as usual) moves on. Forewing length 16.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K47
couplets.question: Hindwing tornus rounded vs. Hindwing tornus more angled?
couplets.a_text: Hindwing tornus rounded. Underside forewing variable, and postdiscal spots may be missing below vein 3; spot in space 3, when fully developed, elongated towards base; spot in space 1b, when present, placed midway between the end-cell bar and the postdiscal spot in space 2. Underside hindwing postdiscal band widely dislocated at vein 2. ♂ upperside purple blue, border a thread. ♀ purple with the hindwing borders variable, the purple colour sometimes reaching the termen between veins 2 and 5 and sometimes being almost confined to the cell. (amphimuta group, kurzi subgroup). ... Arhopala kurzi
couplets.b_text: Hindwing tornus more angled. Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 3 not elongated and spot in space 1b, when present, close to the spot in space 2, as usual. Underside hindwing postdiscal band dislocated so that the inner edge of the spot in space 2 is in line with, or only a little outside, the outer edge of the spot in space 1b.
couplets.hint: Yes identifies A. kurzi. Underside cues: forewing postdiscal spot in space 3 elongated towards the base, spot 1b (when present) shifted inward midway between the end-cell bar and spot 2, and a widely dislocated HW band; spots 4 and 5 often appear vertically in line. Hindwing tornus rounded. Forewing length 18.0-22.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K48
couplets.question: Underside forewing postdiscal spots in spaces 2 and 3 in echelon, the former nearer the termen vs. Underside forewing postdiscal spots in spaces 2 and 3 in line, but may be rather oblique?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing postdiscal spots in spaces 2 and 3 in echelon, the former nearer the termen. valva unilobate. (amphimuta group, muta subgroup).
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing postdiscal spots in spaces 2 and 3 in line, but may be rather oblique. valva bilobate. (amphimuta group, perimuta subgroup).
couplets.hint: Splits the amphimuta subgroups by the forewing postdiscal spots in spaces 2 and 3. In echelon, spot 2 stepped outward towards the termen (Yes) = muta subgroup, unilobate valva. In line, though possibly oblique (No) = perimuta subgroup, bilobate valva.

couplets.label: K49
couplets.question: ♂ upperside purplish blue, hardly shining vs. ♂ upperside strongly shining?
couplets.a_text: ♂ upperside purplish blue, hardly shining; forewing border 1.0 mm at tornus expanding to 2.0 mm at apex. ... Arhopala tropaea
couplets.b_text: ♂ upperside strongly shining. Larger.
couplets.hint: Yes identifies A. tropaea — very small (FW only 13-14 mm) and hardly shining, with quadrate/banded underside spots and spot 2 strongly stepped out. No (strongly shining and larger) leads on to A. muta and A. moorei. Forewing length 13.0-14.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K50
couplets.question: ♂ upperside forewing rather dark, bright blue vs. ♂ upperside both wings the same colour in all lights?
couplets.a_text: ♂ upperside forewing rather dark, bright blue; border 1.0-1.5 mm at tornus expanding to 1.5-2.0 mm at apex. Upperside hindwing slightly paler and brighter blue. ♀ shining blue with only a slight purple tint. ... Arhopala muta
couplets.b_text: ♂ upperside both wings the same colour in all lights. ♀ bluish purple. Fwl 16.0-18.0 mm. ... Arhopala moorei
couplets.hint: Separates A. muta (Mutal Oakblue) from A. moorei (Moore's Oakblue); their undersides are essentially identical. Yes (muta): hindwing a slightly paler, brighter blue than the forewing. No (moorei): both wings the same shade in all lights (valva unilobate). Needs an upperside view. Forewing length 17.0-19.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K51
couplets.question: Underside hair brown with tornal green scales on hindwing vs. Underside hindwing with a central yellowish area and no tornal green scales?
couplets.a_text: Underside hair brown with tornal green scales on hindwing. ♂ upperside forewing dark, shining violet blue, border 1.5 mm; hindwing brilliant, greenish blue, strongly contrasting with the forewing. ♀ shining blue with a violet tint, hindwing border very regular. ... Arhopala metamuta
couplets.b_text: Underside hindwing with a central yellowish area and no tornal green scales. ♂ upperside shining blue, forewing border 1.5 mm. Fwl 17.0 mm. ... Arhopala perimuta
couplets.hint: Separates A. metamuta from A. perimuta (Yellowdisc Oakblue) on the hindwing underside. Yes (metamuta): brown with green tornal scales. No (perimuta): a central yellowish disc and no green tornal scales. Above, metamuta shows a brilliant greenish-blue hindwing contrasting the forewing. Forewing length 18.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K52
couplets.question: Underside hindwing postdiscal band completely dislocated at vein 2 (character rather inconstant in A vs. Underside hindwing postdiscal band only partially dislocated at vein 2?
couplets.a_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal band completely dislocated at vein 2 (character rather inconstant in A. antimuta).
couplets.b_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal band only partially dislocated at vein 2.
couplets.hint: A major split on the hindwing postdiscal band at vein 2. Completely dislocated (Yes) = the band is fully broken into two offset portions; only partially dislocated (No) = the spot in space 2 is merely stepped from space 1b. Rather inconstant in A. antimuta, so weigh other characters too.

couplets.label: K53
couplets.question: Hindwing tailless vs. Hindwing tailed?
couplets.a_text: Hindwing tailless.
couplets.b_text: Hindwing tailed.
couplets.hint: A structural split: check for a slender tail (filament) on the hindwing at vein 2. Tailless (Yes) narrows to the two tailless species A. antimuta and A. inornata; tailed (No) opens the large tailed branch.

couplets.label: K54
couplets.question: Underside hindwing with green tornal scales vs. Underside hindwing without tornal green scales?
couplets.a_text: Underside hindwing with green tornal scales. ♂ upperside dark, shining, violet blue, forewing border 0.5 mm. ♀ blue to purple blue. ... Arhopala antimuta
couplets.b_text: Underside hindwing without tornal green scales; tornus very rounded. ♂ upperside bright violet blue, border a thread. ♀ bluer with narrow borders, only 0.5 mm on hindwing. Fwl 21.0 mm. (inornata group). ... Arhopala inornata
couplets.hint: Separates A. antimuta (Small Tailless Oakblue) from A. inornata (Inornate Oakblue). Yes (antimuta): green tornal scales on the hindwing. No (inornata): no green tornal scales, hindwing very rounded at the tornus, and larger (FW ~21 vs 16 mm). Forewing length 16.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K55
couplets.question: Underside forewing with a costal spot mid-space 11 vs. Underside forewing without spot mid-space 11?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing with a costal spot mid-space 11; post discal spot in space 4 shifted distad out of line with spots in spaces 5 and 6.
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing without spot mid-space 11; postdiscal spots in spaces 4, 5 and 6 in line. Underside hindwing central cell spot band-like, stretching right cross the cell. (agrata group, ace subgroup).
couplets.hint: Look at the forewing: a costal spot in mid-space 11 plus the postdiscal spot in space 4 kicked outward, out of line with spots 5 and 6 (Yes), points towards the democritus/alitaeus groups. No spot in space 11, spots 4-5-6 in line, and a band-like HW cell spot (No) = agrata group, ace subgroup.

couplets.label: K56
couplets.question: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 outwardly concave vs. Underside of hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 outwardly straight or convex?
couplets.a_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 outwardly concave. Hindwing tail short, 1.5-2.0 mm long. Underside dark chocolate, with markings outlined by white striae and dots, and difficult to make out (ssp. democritus) or hair brown with striae pale buff (ssp. lycaenaria). (democritus group).... Arhopala democritus
couplets.b_text: Underside of hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 outwardly straight or convex. Hindwing tail 3.5-4.0 mm long (except 2.5 mm in A. denta). (alitaeus group)
couplets.hint: Yes identifies A. democritus (White-dot Oakblue): hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 outwardly concave and a short tail (1.5-2 mm); ground dark chocolate with white striae or hair brown with buff striae. No (spot 6 straight/convex, tail 3.5-4 mm) = alitaeus group.

couplets.label: K57
couplets.question: Underside forewing without spot at extreme base of space 10 vs. Underside forewing with a spot at extreme base of space 10 above the central cell spot (occasionally absent on one or both sides)?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing without spot at extreme base of space 10.
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing with a spot at extreme base of space 10 above the central cell spot (occasionally absent on one or both sides).
couplets.hint: Look at the extreme base of forewing space 10, just above the central cell spot. Without a spot there (Yes) versus with one present (No, occasionally absent on one or both sides) splits the alitaeus group into two branches.
couplets.guide_phrase: spot at extreme base of space 10
couplets.question_phrase: spot at extreme base of space 10

couplets.label: K58
couplets.question: Male upperside forewing border less than 0.5 mm vs. Male upperside forewing border at least 1.0 mm and expanding slightly towards costa?
couplets.a_text: Male upperside forewing border less than 0.5 mm.
couplets.b_text: Male upperside forewing border at least 1.0 mm and expanding slightly towards costa.
couplets.hint: A male upperside border character, not judgeable from an underside photo alone. A thread-thin border (<0.5 mm) keeps you among the faint-marked elopura/arianaga/havilandi trio; a border of at least 1.0 mm that widens towards the costa jumps to the ariana/aida pair.

couplets.label: K59
couplets.question: Underside hair brown with weakly contrasting markings vs. Underside pale slatey purple with contrasting reddish brown markings?
couplets.a_text: Underside hair brown with weakly contrasting markings.
couplets.b_text: Underside pale slatey purple with contrasting reddish brown markings. ♂ border a thread. Fwl 17.0-20.0 mm.... Arhopala havilandi
couplets.hint: 'No' identifies A. havilandi: its underside is pale slatey purple with contrasting reddish-brown markings and a thread-thin male border. 'Yes' (uniform hair brown, faint markings barely darker than the ground) keeps elopura and arianaga in play.

couplets.label: K60
couplets.question: Underside markings barely darker than ground colour vs. Underside markings a little darker than the ground colour and with a very faint pinkish glaze?
couplets.a_text: Underside markings barely darker than ground colour. ♂ border from a thread to just under 0.5 mm; hindwing space 6 partly fuscous. ... Arhopala elopura
couplets.b_text: Underside markings a little darker than the ground colour and with a very faint pinkish glaze. ♂ border a thread; hindwing space 6 all blue. Fwl 21.0-22.0 mm.... Arhopala arianaga
couplets.hint: Separates A. elopura (Yellow Tailed Oakblue) from A. arianaga. Elopura's markings are barely darker than the ground with HW space 6 partly fuscous, 17-19 mm; arianaga is montane (>1000 m), has a faint pinkish glaze, markings a little darker, space 6 all blue, and is larger at 21-22 mm. Forewing length 17.0-19.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K61
couplets.question: Forewing termen slightly convex and apex not produced vs. Forewing termen straight and apex slightly produced?
couplets.a_text: Forewing termen slightly convex and apex not produced. Underside rather dark brown, usually with a faint purplish wash. ♂ forewing border 1.0-1.5 mm at tornus increasing slightly at apex. ... Arhopala ariana
couplets.b_text: Forewing termen straight and apex slightly produced. Underside paler brown with a slatey glaze (rather weak in the Malay Peninsula) in subsp. aida or purplish glaze in subsp. ophir. Fwl 16.0-19.0 mm.... Arhopala aida
couplets.hint: Yes = A. ariana (Pinkish-washed Oakblue): FW termen slightly convex, apex not produced, underside dark brown with a purplish wash. No = A. aida: FW termen straight, apex slightly produced, paler brown with a slatey or purplish glaze and smaller (16-19 mm). Forewing length 20.0-21.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K62
couplets.question: ♂ border at least 1.0 mm vs. ♂ border a thread?
couplets.a_text: ♂ border at least 1.0 mm.
couplets.b_text: ♂ border a thread.
couplets.hint: A male upperside border character, hard to read from an underside photo. 'Yes' (border at least 1.0 mm) leads to the pseudomuta/alitaeus pair; a thread-thin border ('No') jumps ahead to the sintanga/denta branch.

couplets.label: K63
couplets.question: Underside hair brown with markings hardly darker than the ground colour vs. Underside pale slatey purple with purple brown, rather macular markings?
couplets.a_text: Underside hair brown with markings hardly darker than the ground colour; hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 usually slightly oblique and not overlapping the end-cell bar. ... Arhopala pseudomuta
couplets.b_text: Underside pale slatey purple with purple brown, rather macular markings; hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 rounded and overlapping the end-cell bar. Fwl 16.0-17.0 mm.... Arhopala alitaeus
couplets.hint: Yes = A. pseudomuta (Raffles's Oakblue), No = A. alitaeus. Spot-6 overlap is unreliable between these two; judge by the underside markings instead: pseudomuta is uniform hair brown with faint markings barely darker than the ground, alitaeus pale slatey purple with contrasting purple-brown, macular/annular markings. Forewing length 19.0-20.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K64
couplets.question: Underside pale slatey purple with contrasting reddish brown markings Hindwing tail 3.5-4.0 mm vs. Underside hair brown, sometimes with faint pinkish wash?
couplets.a_text: Underside pale slatey purple with contrasting reddish brown markings Hindwing tail 3.5-4.0 mm. ♂ upperside dark violet. ... Arhopala sintanga
couplets.b_text: Underside hair brown, sometimes with faint pinkish wash. Hindwing tail 2.5 mm. ♂ upperside brilliant blue. Fwl 17.0-19.0 mm. ... Arhopala denta
couplets.hint: Yes = A. sintanga (pale slatey purple, contrasting reddish-brown markings, dark violet male, tail 3.5-4.0 mm). No = A. denta (hair brown, sometimes a faint pink wash, brilliant blue male, and a short tail ~2.5 mm, about half the length of others in the group). Tail length is the easiest underside cue. Forewing length 20.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K65
couplets.question: Underside forewing postdiscal band dislocated at vein 4 vs. Underside forewing postdiscal band sinuous or only slightly dislocated at vein 4?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing postdiscal band dislocated at vein 4; hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 outwardly concave; all markings wide. ♂ upperside shining, dark blue, border a thread. ♀ purple. ... Arhopala ace
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing postdiscal band sinuous or only slightly dislocated at vein 4; hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 outwardly straight or convex. ♂ upperside dark blue, border 2.0 mm at mid-termen of forewing and 3.0 mm on hindwing. ♀ purple. Fwl 19.0 mm. ... Arhopala azinis
couplets.hint: Yes = A. ace (Tytler's Dull Oakblue). Key underside cue: ace's HW postdiscal spot 6 is outwardly concave with all markings wide, and the FW band is fully dislocated at vein 4. No (spot 6 straight/convex, band only sinuous or slightly dislocated) leads to A. azinis and the wider agrata group. Forewing length 22.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K66
couplets.question: Underside forewing postdiscal band sinuous or only slightly dislocated at vein 4 vs. Underside hindwing central cell spot rounded or oval, as usual?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing postdiscal band sinuous or only slightly dislocated at vein 4; hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 outwardly straight or convex. ♂ upperside dark blue, border 2.0 mm at mid-termen of forewing and 3.0 mm on hindwing. ♀ purple. ... Arhopala azinis
couplets.b_text: Underside hindwing central cell spot rounded or oval, as usual.
couplets.hint: Yes = A. azinis: HW central cell spot band-like right across the cell, spot 6 straight or convex (not concave as in ace) and not reaching the end-cell bar, with broad male borders (2.0-3.0 mm). No continues to the agrata and cleander groups. Forewing length 19.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K67
couplets.question: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 9 absent or very faint, and no costal spot in space 10 vs. Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 9 well-marked, costal spot in space 10 usually present?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 9 absent or very faint, and no costal spot in space 10; hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 considerably wider than that in space 7; all markings rather faint. ♂ upperside dark purplish blue, border a thread. ♀ bright blue to purple blue with hindwing border less than 1.0 mm between veins 2 and 6. (agrata group, agrata subgroup). ... Arhopala agrata
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 9 well-marked, costal spot in space 10 usually present; hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 not much wider than that in space 7; all markings clearly defined. ♀ hindwing border solid and at least 1.5 mm wide. (cleander group).
couplets.hint: Yes = A. agrata (De Niceville's Oakblue): faint markings, FW postdiscal spot 9 absent or very faint, no costal spot in space 10, HW spot 6 much wider than spot 7. No enters the cleander group, where spot 9 is well-marked, a space-10 costal spot is usually present and all markings are crisply defined.

couplets.label: K68
couplets.question: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 9 well-marked, costal spot in space 10 usually present vs. [Condition: Cleander group branch alternate]?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 9 well-marked, costal spot in space 10 usually present; hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 not much wider than that in space 7; all markings clearly defined. ♀ hindwing border solid and at least 1.5 mm wide. (cleander group).
couplets.b_text: [Condition: Cleander group branch alternate].
couplets.hint: A group gate for the cleander group: FW postdiscal spot 9 well-marked, costal spot in space 10 usually present, HW spot 6 not much wider than spot 7, all markings clearly defined. Both routes continue on to key 127.

couplets.label: K69
couplets.question: Hindwing without a conspicuously projecting tornal lobe vs. Hindwing with a conspicuously projecting tornal lobe?
couplets.a_text: Hindwing without a conspicuously projecting tornal lobe. Smaller, fwl less than 21.0 mm. (cleander group, alea subgroup).
couplets.b_text: Hindwing with a conspicuously projecting tornal lobe. Larger, fwl more than 21.0 mm. (cleander group, cleander subgroup).
couplets.hint: Splits the cleander group by tornal lobe and size. Yes = alea subgroup: no conspicuously projecting HW tornal lobe, smaller (fwl <21 mm). No = cleander subgroup: a conspicuous projecting tornal lobe and larger (>21 mm).

couplets.label: K70
couplets.question: Underside pale slatey purple with conspicuous dark markings outlined by purplish white striae vs. Underside hair brown, with slatey glaze in A?
couplets.a_text: Underside pale slatey purple with conspicuous dark markings outlined by purplish white striae. ♂ upperside dark, shining violet blue, with forewing border 0.5 mm at tornus expanding to 1.0 mm at apex. ♀ purple blue. ... Arhopala aurelia
couplets.b_text: Underside hair brown, with slatey glaze in A. evansi; markings not conspicuously darker than the ground colour and outlined by pale buff striae.
couplets.hint: Yes = A. aurelia: underside pale slatey purple with conspicuous dark markings outlined by purplish-white striae. No keeps the hair-brown species (markings barely darker than the ground, pale buff striae; evansi carries a slatey glaze) in play. Forewing length 19.0-20.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K71
couplets.question: ♂ upperside forewing border increases towards apex vs. ♂ upperside forewing border regular and not more than 0.5 mm wide?
couplets.a_text: ♂ upperside forewing border increases towards apex; hind wing blue does not reach termen in space 6.
couplets.b_text: ♂ upperside forewing border regular and not more than 0.5 mm wide; hindwing blue reaches termen in space 6.
couplets.hint: A male upperside character. Yes (border widening towards the apex, HW blue stopping short of the termen in space 6) leads to the selta/phaenops pair; No (even border no more than 0.5 mm, HW blue reaching the space-6 termen) advances further into the subgroup.

couplets.label: K72
couplets.question: ♂ forewing termen rounded vs. ♂ forewing with central part of the termen more or less straight, as in other species of the group (except A?
couplets.a_text: ♂ forewing termen rounded; upperside violet blue, with forewing border 0.75 mm at tornus expanding to nearly 1.5 mm at apex and hindwing border 1.25 mm. ♀ purplish blue. Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 widely overlaps end-cell bar. ... Arhopala selta
couplets.b_text: ♂ forewing with central part of the termen more or less straight, as in other species of the group (except A. aroa). ♂ upperside violet blue, border 0.5 mm at forewing tornus expanding to 1.0 mm at apex. Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 usually not, or only just, overlapping the end-cell bar. Fwl 18.0-20.0 mm. ... Arhopala phaenops
couplets.hint: Yes = A. selta (Reddish-brown Oakblue): FW termen rounded and HW postdiscal spot 6 widely overlapping the end-cell bar. No = A. phaenops (Sumatran Oakblue): FW termen straight and spot 6 usually not, or only just, overlapping the bar. Forewing length 18.0-19.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K73
couplets.question: ♂ upperside blue without a violet tinge vs. ♂ upperside blue with a violet tinge, which becomes more pronounced under electric light?
couplets.a_text: ♂ upperside blue without a violet tinge.
couplets.b_text: ♂ upperside blue with a violet tinge, which becomes more pronounced under electric light.
couplets.hint: A male upperside colour character; tilt the specimen, as the violet tinge strengthens under electric light. Yes (pure blue, no violet) leads to the sublustris/milleri pair; No (violet-tinged blue) advances to the evansi branch.

couplets.label: K74
couplets.question: ♂ upperside bright glistening blue vs. ♂ upperside more matt, darker indigo blue?
couplets.a_text: ♂ upperside bright glistening blue; forewing border a little under 0.5 mm. ♀ upperside forewing black border below vein 4 not usually tapering to tornus. Smaller, fwl averaging 18.0 mm. ... Arhopala sublustris
couplets.b_text: ♂ upperside more matt, darker indigo blue; forewing border a thread. ♀ upperside forewing border tapers to tornus. Larger, fwl averaging 19.5 mm. ... Arhopala milleri
couplets.hint: Yes = A. sublustris (Bright Oakblue): bright glistening blue male, border under 0.5 mm, smaller (~18 mm). No = A. milleri: matt, darker indigo, border reduced to a thread, larger (~19.5 mm). On the underside milleri usually lacks the FW costal spot in space 10 that sublustris shows.

couplets.label: K75
couplets.question: Underside with a slatey glaze vs. Underside without a glaze?
couplets.a_text: Underside with a slatey glaze; forewing postdiscal spots in spaces 2 and 3 in echelon and upright, and larger than the spots above them; hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 outwardly convex and with its inner edge more or less in line with the outer edge of the end-cell bar; striae outlining the markings whiter than in the other species of the subgroup (except A. aurelia). ♂ upperside violet tinge not strong, border 0.5 mm. ♀ forewing border decreases towards tornus. ... Arhopala evansi
couplets.b_text: Underside without a glaze; occasionally with a faint rosy wash in A. phanda.
couplets.hint: Yes = A. evansi: underside with a slatey/rosy glaze, whiter striae, and FW postdiscal spots in spaces 2 and 3 upright, in echelon and larger than the spots above them. No (no glaze, at most a faint rosy wash in phanda) continues through the subgroup. Forewing length 18.0-21.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K76
couplets.question: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 quadrate, with its outer edge usually just overlapping, or in line with, the inner edge of the spot in space 5 vs. Wings shaped as in A?
couplets.a_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 quadrate, with its outer edge usually just overlapping, or in line with, the inner edge of the spot in space 5; forewing costal spot in space 10 usually absent and postdiscal band not, or only slightly, dislocated at vein 4.
couplets.b_text: Wings shaped as in A. sublustris and A. phanda. Underside with postdiscal band close to inner submarginal lunules; hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 usually not much narrower at bottom than at top and widely overlapping the end-cell bar. ♂ upperside violet tinge not very strong. ♀ with forewing borders as in A. phanda. Fwl 17.0–19.0 mm. ... Arhopala normani
couplets.hint: Yes (HW spot 6 quadrate, its outer edge just meeting or overlapping the inner edge of spot 5; FW costal spot in space 10 usually absent and band barely dislocated at vein 4) advances. No = A. normani: postdiscal band close to the inner submarginal lunules and spot 6 widely overlapping the end-cell bar.

couplets.label: K77
couplets.question: Underside postdiscal band close to the inner submarginal lunules on both wings vs. Underside postdiscal band well separated from the inner submarginal lunules, the interval in spaces 3, 4 and 5 of the hindwing being as wide as the postdiscal spots?
couplets.a_text: Underside postdiscal band close to the inner submarginal lunules on both wings. ♂ upperside darker and more violet than in A. evansi. ... Arhopala phanda
couplets.b_text: Underside postdiscal band well separated from the inner submarginal lunules, the interval in spaces 3, 4 and 5 of the hindwing being as wide as the postdiscal spots. Wings rather elongate, forewing termen slightly more oblique than in other species of subgroup. ♂ upperside rather pale violet. ♀ unknown. Fwl 14.5 mm. Borneo. ... Arhopala aenigma
couplets.hint: Judge the gap between the underside postdiscal band and the inner submarginal lunules on both wings. Band hugging the lunules = A. phanda (Golden Oakblue). No routes to A. aenigma, where the band sits well clear (interval in HW spaces 3-5 as wide as the spots) and which is smaller (Fwl ~14.5 mm, Borneo). Forewing length 17.0-19.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K78
couplets.question: Wings shaped as in A vs. Wings rather elongate and forewing termen rounded?
couplets.a_text: Wings shaped as in A. sublustris and A. phanda. Underside with postdiscal band close to inner submarginal lunules; hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 usually not much narrower at bottom than at top and widely overlapping the end-cell bar. ♂ upperside violet tinge not very strong. ♀ with forewing borders as in A. phanda. ... Arhopala normani
couplets.b_text: Wings rather elongate and forewing termen rounded. Underside postdiscal band well separated from the inner submarginal lunules; hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 much narrower at bottom than at top, and usually barely overlapping the end-cell bar. ♂ upperside deeper violet than in A. aenigma. ♀ forewing border narrow, decreasing towards tornus and not reaching the cell apex. Fwl 18.0–21.0 mm. ... Arhopala aroa
couplets.hint: Compare HW postdiscal spot 6. In A. normani it is scarcely narrower at the bottom than the top and widely overlaps the end-cell bar, with the band close to the lunules. No leads to A. aroa, whose spot 6 tapers sharply at the base and barely touches the end-cell bar, its band well separated and wings more elongate. Forewing length 17.0–19.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K79
couplets.question: Underside forewing postdiscal band not dislocated at vein 4, though it may be sinuous there vs. Underside forewing postdiscal band partially dislocated at vein 4?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing postdiscal band not dislocated at vein 4, though it may be sinuous there. ♂ upperside violet blue with forewing border 1.0–2.0 mm at tornus increasing to 2.0–3.0 mm at apex. ... Arhopala cleander
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing postdiscal band partially dislocated at vein 4. ♂ forewing border not more than 1.0 mm.
couplets.hint: Check whether the underside FW postdiscal band steps (dislocates) at vein 4. Unbroken, though possibly sinuous = A. cleander (Large Mergui Oakblue), a large insect with a broad male border. A partial dislocation at vein 4 (and a male border under 1 mm) sends you on to key 149. Forewing length 23.0–24.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K80
couplets.question: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 9 as wide as, or wider than, the spot in 6 and in continuation of the spots in spaces 4–6 vs. Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 9 usually narrower than the spot in space 6 and shifted basad out of line with the spots in spaces 4–6?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 9 as wide as, or wider than, the spot in 6 and in continuation of the spots in spaces 4–6; costal spot in space 10 usually as wide as the end-cell bar and placed immediately above it; hindwing postdiscal spots in spaces 6 and 7 oblique and in echelon, the former with its outer edge straight or convex and usually overlapping the end-cell bar. ♂ upperside normally deep blue with hardly any violet tinge, but a larger, more violet form occurs rarely. ... Arhopala zambra
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 9 usually narrower than the spot in space 6 and shifted basad out of line with the spots in spaces 4–6; costal spot in space 10 usually narrower than the end-cell bar and placed over its outer edge. ♂ violet blue.
couplets.hint: Focus on the FW postdiscal spot in space 9: in A. zambra (Zambra Oakblue) it is as wide as spot 6 and lines up with spots 4-6, and the space-10 costal spot is as broad as the end-cell bar right above it. If spot 9 is narrower and shifted inward (costal spot narrower too), go to key 150. Forewing length 22.0–25.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K81
couplets.question: Underside hindwing postdiscal spots in spaces 6 and 7 usually more or less upright, their outer edges in line or nearly so vs. Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 narrower at bottom than at top, its outer edge convex or sinuous and placed well inside the inner edge of the spot in space 5?
couplets.a_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal spots in spaces 6 and 7 usually more or less upright, their outer edges in line or nearly so; spot in space 6 more or less quadrate, usually just about filling the gap between the spot in space 5 and the end-cell bar, but often overlapping the latter and occasionally the former; the gap between the spot in space 5 and the end-cell bar not usually wider than either of these spots. ... Arhopala athada
couplets.b_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 narrower at bottom than at top, its outer edge convex or sinuous and placed well inside the inner edge of the spot in space 5; forewing costal spot in space 10 usually present. Underside hindwing postdiscal spots 6 and 7 more oblique, with the inner edge of the spot in space 7 well inside the outer edge of the spot in space 6; the latter wider at top than at bottom, with its outer edge sinuous and inside the inner edge of the spot in space 5, and its inner edge not overlapping the end-cell bar; the gap between the spot in space 5 and the end-cell bar wider than either of these spots. Fwl 23.0–26.0 mm. ... Arhopala silhetensis
couplets.hint: Gauge the gap between HW spot 5 and the end-cell bar. In A. athada (Vinous Oakblue) spots 6 and 7 stand upright and the quadrate spot 6 nearly fills that gap, which is no wider than either spot. In A. silhetensis (Sylhet Oakblue) the gap is wider than either spot and spot 6 tapers with a convex/sinuous outer edge well inside spot 5; it also runs larger (Fwl up to 26 mm). Forewing length 22.0–23.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K82
couplets.question: Underside forewing without spot in space 11 between the basal and central cell spots vs. Underside forewing with a spot at base of space 11 between the basal and central cell spots?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing without spot in space 11 between the basal and central cell spots.
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing with a spot at base of space 11 between the basal and central cell spots. Hindwing with a short tail. (ganesa group).
couplets.hint: Look between the basal and central cell spots on the underside forewing (space 11). No spot there (Yes) continues the main branch to key 155. A spot present there, with a short hindwing tail, marks the ganesa group (key 203).

couplets.label: K83
couplets.question: ♂ hindwing cell not longer than half the wing vs. ♂ hindwing cell longer than half the wing, and termen of forewing usually straight or slightly concave below vein 5?
couplets.a_text: ♂ hindwing cell not longer than half the wing. Underside forewing postdiscal spots in spaces 2 and 3 not wider than those above vein 4 (except in tailless A. epimete). Tailed or tailless.
couplets.b_text: ♂ hindwing cell longer than half the wing, and termen of forewing usually straight or slightly concave below vein 5. Underside forewing postdiscal spots in spaces 2 and 3 wider than those above vein 4, especially in 3. Hindwing tailed.
couplets.hint: This turns on hindwing cell length (a male upperside feature, so a dorsal view may be needed) and on the underside FW postdiscal spots in spaces 2-3. A short cell with those spots no wider than those above vein 4 keeps you at key 156; a cell longer than half the wing with spots 2-3 broadened (widest in 3), on a tailed wing, jumps to key 192.
couplets.guide_phrase: cell not longer than half the wing
couplets.question_phrase: cell not longer than half the wing

couplets.label: K84
couplets.question: Underside forewing postdiscal spots in spaces 4–6 continuous vs. Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 4 shifted distad out of line with those in spaces 5 and 6?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing postdiscal spots in spaces 4–6 continuous.
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 4 shifted distad out of line with those in spaces 5 and 6. Hindwing tailed. (eumolphus group).
couplets.hint: Check the alignment of the underside FW postdiscal spots in spaces 4-6. A smooth, continuous run (Yes) goes to key 157. If spot 4 is pushed outward (distad), out of line with spots 5 and 6, on a tailed wing, that is the eumolphus group (key 180).
couplets.guide_phrase: postdiscal spot in space 4 shifted distad
couplets.question_phrase: postdiscal spot in space 4 shifted distad

couplets.label: K85
couplets.question: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 5 contiguous with, or very close to, the end-cell bar vs. Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 5 and end-cell bar well separated?
couplets.a_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 5 contiguous with, or very close to, the end-cell bar. Underside pale purple brown with dark markings, and usually with the subapical area of both wings irrorated with whitish scales. ♂ upperside shining violet blue, border 1.0 mm. ♀ brighter blue. (cleander group, agaba subgroup). ... Arhopala agaba
couplets.b_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 5 and end-cell bar well separated.
couplets.hint: A. agaba (Purple-glazed Oakblue) shows two tell-tales: HW postdiscal spot 5 touching, or nearly touching, the end-cell bar, and a pale whitish-irrorated subapical patch on both wings over a pale purple-brown ground, usually obvious even in field photos. If spot 5 stands well clear of the end-cell bar, continue to key 159. Forewing length 20.0–21.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K86
couplets.question: Underside forewing postdiscal band strongly dislocated at vein 4 vs. Underside forewing postdiscal band not strongly dislocated at vein 4, but may be weakly dislocated, or sinuous, there?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing postdiscal band strongly dislocated at vein 4; no costal spot in space 10; hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 more or less rounded. Tailed. ♂ upperside dark violet blue, border a little under 1.0 mm. ♀ bluer. (vihara group). ... Arhopala vihara
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing postdiscal band not strongly dislocated at vein 4, but may be weakly dislocated, or sinuous, there.
couplets.hint: A. vihara (Large Spotted Oakblue) has the underside FW postdiscal band sharply stepped at vein 4, no space-10 costal spot, and a distinctively rounded, isolated HW spot 6 (tailed). If the band is at most weakly dislocated or merely sinuous at vein 4, go to key 161. Forewing length 20.0–22.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K87
couplets.question: Underside forewing postdiscal band not wider in spaces 2 and 3 than in spaces 4–6 vs. Underside forewing lower part of postdiscal band much wider than the upper part?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing postdiscal band not wider in spaces 2 and 3 than in spaces 4–6.
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing lower part of postdiscal band much wider than the upper part; costal spot in space 10 present. Hindwing tailless. ♂ upperside bright blue, forewing border 2.0 mm at tornus increasing to 6.0 mm at costa; hindwing blue confined to cell. Underside brown with a purple wash; no tornal green scales (agelastus group, epimete subgroup). ... Arhopala epimete
couplets.hint: Judge whether the underside FW postdiscal band broadens in its lower half. If spaces 2-3 are no wider than 4-6 (Yes), advance to key 162. A band that widens strongly downward (lower part much broader, space-10 costal spot present, wing tailless) identifies A. epimete.

couplets.label: K88
couplets.question: Underside forewing postdiscal band weakly dislocated at vein 4 vs. Underside forewing postdiscal band continuous?
couplets.a_text: Underside forewing postdiscal band weakly dislocated at vein 4; without spot at base of space 3; normally with a costal spot in space 10; hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 outwardly sinuous or concave. (rama group).
couplets.b_text: Underside forewing postdiscal band continuous; often with a spot at base of space 3; no costal spot in space 10; hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 outwardly convex, except in A. alaconia. (agelastus group).
couplets.hint: Two groups part here. The rama group (Yes, key 163) has a space-10 costal spot, no spot at the base of space 3, and an outwardly sinuous or concave HW spot 6. The agelastus group (No, key 168) lacks the costal spot, often has a space-3 basal spot, and has a convex spot 6 (except A. alaconia).

couplets.label: K89
couplets.question: Hindwing tornal green scales absent or vestigial vs. Hindwing with tornal green scales?
couplets.a_text: Hindwing tornal green scales absent or vestigial; tail 2.5 mm long. Underside pale purplish brown. ♂ upperside violet blue, forewing border 2.0 mm at mid-costa, increasing slightly towards tornus and apex; hindwing border 2.5 mm. ... Arhopala paralea
couplets.b_text: Hindwing with tornal green scales. Underside hair brown.
couplets.hint: A. paralea (a rare montane species) lacks tornal green scales, or shows only vestiges, has a 2.5 mm tail, and a distinctly pale purplish-brown underside. If green tornal scales are present over a plain hair-brown ground, continue to key 165 (buddha/arvina). Forewing length 19.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K90
couplets.question: Hind wing with a tail 1.0 mm long vs. Hindwing tailless?
couplets.a_text: Hind wing with a tail 1.0 mm long. ♂ upper side shining violet blue, border 1.0 mm. ♀ brighter blue with very narrow hindwing border. ... Arhopala buddha
couplets.b_text: Hindwing tailless. ♂ upperside shining dark blue, border a thread. ♀ purple blue. Fwl 18.0 mm. ... Arhopala arvina
couplets.hint: The split is the tail: A. buddha (Buddha Oakblue) carries a short 1 mm tail, whereas A. arvina is tailless, so check the tornal margin at vein 2. Both have a plain hair-brown underside; on the upperside buddha is shining violet blue (border ~1 mm) and arvina darker blue with a thread border. Forewing length 18.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K91
couplets.question: Underside inner submarginal spots in spaces 2 and 3 on forewing and spaces 4 and 5 on hindwing enlarged and darkened vs. Underside all inner submarginal spots the same size and colour?
couplets.a_text: Underside inner submarginal spots in spaces 2 and 3 on forewing and spaces 4 and 5 on hindwing enlarged and darkened; hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 outwardly concave or sinuous. Sexes alike. Upperside violet blue with forewing border 3.0 mm at tornus expanding to mid-costa. Normally tailless, but a form with a tail 2.5 mm long (f. kempi) occurs very rarely. (agelastus group; alesia subgroup). ... Arhopala alaconia
couplets.b_text: Underside all inner submarginal spots the same size and colour; hind wing postdiscal spot in space 6 outwardly convex. (agelastus group; agelastus subgroup).
couplets.hint: A. alaconia (Patchy Oakblue) has the inner submarginal spots in FW spaces 2-3 and HW spaces 4-5 conspicuously enlarged and darkened, often bold black wedges with thick pale borders (decisive even in field photos), plus a concave or sinuous spot 6. If all submarginal spots are uniform and spot 6 is convex, go to key 170. Forewing length 18.0–20.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K92
couplets.question: Hindwing tailed vs. Hind wing tailless?
