couplets.a_text: Hindwing tailed. ♂ upperside blue, forewing border 2.5 mm at tornus increasing to 8.0 mm at costa. ♀ paler blue. ... Arhopala barami
couplets.b_text: Hind wing tailless.
couplets.hint: Within this agelastus-subgroup cluster A. barami (Wood's Oakblue) is the tailed one; the rest (key 172) are tailless, so check for a tail at vein 2. It is also large (Fwl 22-23 mm) with an exceptionally broad male border, up to 8 mm at the costa (an upperside cue). Forewing length 22.0–23.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K93
couplets.question: Hindwing with cilia dentate at vein 2 vs. Hindwing evenly rounded, underside without tornal green scales?
couplets.a_text: Hindwing with cilia dentate at vein 2; underside with tornal green scales.
couplets.b_text: Hindwing evenly rounded, underside without tornal green scales; markings small and macular. ♂ upperside bright blue with a violet tinge, forewing border 2.0 mm at tornus increasing to 5.0 mm at apex. ♀ a purer blue with black borders a little wider. Fwl 17.0 mm. ... Arhopala cardoni
couplets.hint: A. cardoni has an evenly rounded hindwing with no tornal green scales and small, neat macular markings. If the cilia are toothed (dentate) at vein 2 and green tornal scales are present, continue to key 173 (agelastus and allies).

couplets.label: K94
couplets.question: Underside hindwing postdiscal spots in spaces 2–5 forming an almost even curve vs. Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 3 usually shifted well in, out of line with the spots in spaces 2 and 4?
couplets.a_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal spots in spaces 2–5 forming an almost even curve. ♂ upperside violet blue, forewing border 1.0 mm at tornus increasing to 4.0 mm at apex. ♀ bluer. ... Arhopala agelastus
couplets.b_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 3 usually shifted well in, out of line with the spots in spaces 2 and 4.
couplets.hint: Look at the HW postdiscal spots in spaces 2-5. In A. agelastus (Green-edged Tailless Oakblue) they sweep an almost even curve; if the space-3 spot is shifted well inward, out of line with spots 2 and 4, go to key 175 (labuana/wildeyana). Forewing length 21.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K95
couplets.question: ♂ upperside dark violet, forewing border 0.75 mm at tornus increasing to 2.0 mm at apex vs. ♂ upperside violet blue, forewing border 2.0 mm at tornus increasing to 5.0 mm at costa?
couplets.a_text: ♂ upperside dark violet, forewing border 0.75 mm at tornus increasing to 2.0 mm at apex. ♀ dark blue. ... Arhopala labuana
couplets.b_text: ♂ upperside violet blue, forewing border 2.0 mm at tornus increasing to 5.0 mm at costa. ♀ blue. Fwl 16.0 mm. ... Arhopala wildeyana
couplets.hint: These two share the inward-shifted HW spot 3 and separate mostly on size and male upperside (a dorsal view helps): A. labuana is larger (Fwl 20-22 mm), dark violet with a narrow border; A. wildeyana is small (Fwl ~16 mm), violet blue with a broader border (2-5 mm). Forewing length 20.0–22.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K96
couplets.question: Underside purplish brown with very dark markings vs. Underside hair brown?
couplets.a_text: Underside purplish brown with very dark markings; forewing apex powdered with pale violet scales. ♂ upperside deep purple, forewing border 1.5 mm at tornus decreasing to 1.0 mm at apex. ♀ deep blue to purple blue. ... Arhopala bazalus
couplets.b_text: Underside hair brown.
couplets.hint: Yes clinches A. bazalus (Powdered Oakblue): a dark purplish-brown underside with very dark markings, plus a forewing apex dusted with pale violet scales. No routes to the hair-brown-underside species (key 181+). The pale-violet apical powdering is the easiest tell. Forewing length 21.0–25.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K97
couplets.question: ♂ upperside not green vs. ♂ upperside green?
couplets.a_text: ♂ upperside not green. Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 usually outwardly straight.
couplets.b_text: ♂ upperside green. Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 usually outwardly concave.
couplets.hint: An underside-friendly split of the eumolphus group by hindwing postdiscal spot 6: outwardly straight goes with the blue/purple males (overdijkinki, acta, tameanga → key 183); outwardly concave goes with the green males (horsfieldi, eumolphus, hellenore → key 188). Upperside colour confirms if visible.

couplets.label: K98
couplets.question: Hindwing tail 5.0 mm long vs. Hindwing tail 3.0 mm?
couplets.a_text: Hindwing tail 5.0 mm long. ♂ upperside rich violet, forewing border 2.5 mm at tornus increasing to 7.0 mm at costa. ♀ upperside shining blue, forewing border evenly curved. (oenea group). ... Arhopala overdijkinki
couplets.b_text: Hindwing tail 3.0 mm. ♂ upperside forewing border regular and very narrow.
couplets.hint: Yes is A. overdijkinki: a rare, large species with a notably long tail (~5 mm) and very broad rich-violet male borders (2.5 mm at tornus widening to 7 mm at costa). No leads to shorter-tailed (~3 mm), narrow-bordered species (key 184). Forewing length 22.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K99
couplets.question: Forewing rounded vs. ♂ forewing with apex rather acute and termen nearly straight?
couplets.a_text: Forewing rounded. Underside markings faint. ♂ upperside light violet blue. ♀ purple blue with hindwing border 1.0 mm wide between veins 2 and 6. ... Arhopala acta
couplets.b_text: ♂ forewing with apex rather acute and termen nearly straight. Underside markings clearly defined. ♂ upperside dark violet blue. ♀ purple blue, hindwing border at least 2.0 mm wide. Borneo. ... Arhopala tameanga
couplets.hint: Separates A. acta (Yes) from A. tameanga (No, Borneo). acta has a rounded forewing and faint underside markings; tameanga has a more acute apex, clearly defined well-contrasted markings, and is larger. Marking sharpness is the easiest underside cue. Forewing length 21.0–23.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K100
couplets.question: ♂ upperside with very broad black borders, reaching the cell on both wings vs. ♂ forewing rounded?
couplets.a_text: ♂ upperside with very broad black borders, reaching the cell on both wings. Underside markings broad. ... Arhopala horsfieldi
couplets.b_text: ♂ forewing rounded. ♂ upperside forewing border 2.0 mm at tornus decreasing to 1.0 mm at apex. ♀ purple blue, borders slightly narrower than in A. horsfieldi, reaching the forewing cell apex or very nearly so. Fwl 21.0–23.0 mm. ... Arhopala eumolphus
couplets.hint: Yes is A. horsfieldi (Peacock Oakblue): very broad black male borders reaching the cell on both wings, and broad underside markings. No continues to A. eumolphus/hellenore, which have narrower borders and finer underside markings (key 189). Forewing length 21.0–23.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K101
couplets.question: ♂ forewing rounded vs. ♂ forewing with apex acute and termen straight or slightly concave?
couplets.a_text: ♂ forewing rounded. ♂ upperside forewing border 2.0 mm at tornus decreasing to 1.0 mm at apex. ♀ purple blue, borders slightly narrower than in A. horsfieldi, reaching the forewing cell apex or very nearly so. ... Arhopala eumolphus
couplets.b_text: ♂ forewing with apex acute and termen straight or slightly concave. ♂ upperside forewing border a thread above vein 4. ♀ forewing border narrower, usually about 3.0 mm beyond the cell apex. Fwl 23.0–24.0 mm. ... Arhopala hellenore
couplets.hint: Splits A. eumolphus (Green Oakblue, Yes) from A. hellenore (Doherty's Green Oakblue, No). eumolphus has a rounded forewing; hellenore an acute apex with a straight or slightly concave termen and a narrower female border. Undersides are alike, so judge forewing shape. Forewing length 21.0–23.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K102
couplets.question: Hindwing tail filamentous, 3.5 mm long vs. Hindwing tail short and stout, just under 2.0 mm long?
couplets.a_text: Hindwing tail filamentous, 3.5 mm long. Underside forewing basal half of space 1b completely darkened. ♂ upperside dark purple with very narrow border. ♀ purple blue. (corinda group). ... Arhopala corinda
couplets.b_text: Hindwing tail short and stout, just under 2.0 mm long. Underside forewing dark patch in space 1b not solid. ♂ upperside green; ♀ blue to purple blue. (aurea group).
couplets.hint: Yes is A. corinda (Ultramarine Oakblue): a long filamentous tail (~3.5 mm) and a solid, unbroken dark patch filling the basal half of forewing space 1b. No goes to the aurea group — short stout tail (<2 mm) and a space-1b patch that is not solid. Forewing length 21–24 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K103
couplets.question: Underside markings complete vs. Underside hair brown with markings incomplete?
couplets.a_text: Underside markings complete.
couplets.b_text: Underside hair brown with markings incomplete; no basal or central cell spots on forewing and a variable number of basal and discal spots missing on hindwing; postdiscal band narrow. ♂ upperside brilliant green turning to violet blue at the tornus of both wings; border a thread. Fwl 18.0–20.0 mm. ... Arhopala caeca
couplets.hint: Yes (complete markings) advances the aurea group (key 195). No is A. caeca: its underside markings are conspicuously incomplete — no basal or central cell spots on the forewing, several hindwing spots missing, and a narrow postdiscal band. The gaps are the giveaway.

couplets.label: K104
couplets.question: Underside hair brown vs. Underside purple washed?
couplets.a_text: Underside hair brown.
couplets.b_text: Underside purple washed.
couplets.hint: Ground-colour split within the aurea group. A plain hair-brown underside (Yes) goes to A. aurea/borneensis (key 196); a distinct purple wash over the brown (No) goes to A. trogon/stinga (key 198). Judge the overall underside tint in even light.

couplets.label: K105
couplets.question: ♂ upperside forewing border 0.75–1.5 mm at tornus decreasing to a thread above vein 3 or 4 vs. ♂ upperside forewing border a thread throughout, brassier green with stronger basal blue suffusion?
couplets.a_text: ♂ upperside forewing border 0.75–1.5 mm at tornus decreasing to a thread above vein 3 or 4; blue flush at wing bases weak. ♀ upperside hindwing border comparatively narrow, reaching less than halfway to end-cell. ... Arhopala aurea
couplets.b_text: ♂ upperside forewing border a thread throughout, brassier green with stronger basal blue suffusion; hindwing with green usually reaching the termen in spaces 5 and/or 6. ♀ upperside hindwing border reaching at least halfway to end-cell. Fwl 16.0–19.0 mm. Borneo. ... Arhopala borneensis
couplets.hint: A. aurea (Long-celled Oakblue, Yes) vs A. borneensis (No) — undersides are identical, so use the upperside. aurea: male border 0.75–1.5 mm at tornus, weak basal blue. borneensis: border a thread throughout, brassier green with stronger basal blue, green often reaching the hindwing termen. Forewing length 18.0–21.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K106
couplets.question: ♂ upperside brassy green with a strong blue suffusion at wing bases vs. ♂ upperside green less brassy and without basal blue suffusion?
couplets.a_text: ♂ upperside brassy green with a strong blue suffusion at wing bases; forewing border a thread, and on hindwing green usually reaches the termen in spaces 4 and 5. ... Arhopala trogon
couplets.b_text: ♂ upperside green less brassy and without basal blue suffusion; border 2.5–3.0 mm at forewing tornus decreasing to a thread at vein 6 and reaching end-cell on hindwing. Fwl 18.0–20.0 mm. ... Arhopala stinga
couplets.hint: A. trogon (Green-suffused Oakblue, Yes) vs A. stinga (No) — undersides match, so use the male upperside. trogon is brassy green with strong basal blue suffusion, border a thread, green reaching the termen in spaces 4–5. stinga is less brassy, no basal blue, and a wide (2.5–3 mm) forewing border. Forewing length 18.0–21.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K107
couplets.question: Underside hindwing with a whitish area from costa to mid-cell vs. Underside hindwing white area, if present, confined to the gap between the central and outer spots in space 7?
couplets.a_text: Underside hindwing with a whitish area from costa to mid-cell; no tornal green scales. ♂ upperside bright, pale blue, forewing border 2.0 mm at tornus increasing to 4.0 mm at apex; hindwing mostly fuscous. ♀ similar, but with whitish patch about end-cell on forewing. ... Arhopala paraganesa
couplets.b_text: Underside hindwing white area, if present, confined to the gap between the central and outer spots in space 7.
couplets.hint: Yes is A. paraganesa (Dusky Bushblue): a quadrate whitish area on the hindwing underside from costa to mid-cell, and no tornal green scales; male upperside pale blue with a mostly fuscous hindwing. No goes to species whose white, if any, is confined to space 7 (key 204). Forewing length 15.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K108
couplets.question: Underside hindwing no tornal green scales vs. Underside hindwing with tornal green scales?
couplets.a_text: Underside hindwing no tornal green scales; the gap between the outer and central spots in space 7 whitened. ♂ upperside powdery blue, border 3.0 mm at tornus on forewing increasing to mid-costa and reaching almost to end-cell on hindwing. ♀ similar, but with a dark bar at end-cell on forewing. ... Arhopala ammonides
couplets.b_text: Underside hindwing with tornal green scales.
couplets.hint: Yes is A. ammonides (Little Cerulean Oakblue): no tornal green scales, and the gap between the outer and central spots in hindwing space 7 whitened. No routes to species that DO have tornal green scales (key 207) — check the hindwing tornus for green scaling first. Forewing length 14.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K109
couplets.question: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 continued to the base of the space vs. Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 normal, not reaching to the base of the space?
couplets.a_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 continued to the base of the space; outer and central spots in space 7 separate, and the gap between them filled with white. ♂ upperside dark blue, forewing border 0.5 mm at tornus increasing to 1.5 mm at apex. ♀ border narrow, 2.0 mm wide at forewing tornus and on hindwing. ... Arhopala ammon
couplets.b_text: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 normal, not reaching to the base of the space; outer and central spots in space 7 joined at their upper ends, the gap between them seldom completely whitened. Smaller.
couplets.hint: Yes is A. ammon (Malayan Oakblue): hindwing spot 6 runs right to the base of the space, and the space-7 spots stay separate with a white-filled gap. No goes to smaller A. ariel/elizabethae — spot 6 normal (not reaching the base) and space-7 spots joined at their upper ends. Forewing length 16.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K110
couplets.question: ♂ upperside bluish purple, hardly shining, border 1.5 mm at forewing tornus increasing to 4.0 mm at apex and 2.0 mm on hindwing vs. ♂ upperside shining, deep blue, borders a little wider?
couplets.a_text: ♂ upperside bluish purple, hardly shining, border 1.5 mm at forewing tornus increasing to 4.0 mm at apex and 2.0 mm on hindwing. ♀ bluer, borders broader. ... Arhopala ariel
couplets.b_text: ♂ upperside shining, deep blue, borders a little wider. ♀ similar. Fwl 13.0 mm. ... Arhopala elizabethae
couplets.hint: A. ariel (Chocolate Oakblue, Yes) vs A. elizabethae (No): near-identical tiny species (~13 mm), so the male upperside decides — ariel is dull bluish purple, hardly shining; elizabethae is shining deep blue with slightly wider borders. Forewing length 13.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

couplets.label: K111
couplets.question: Underside hair brown, markings not prominently darkened vs. Underside markings much darkened?
couplets.a_text: Underside hair brown, markings not prominently darkened. Underside forewing without spot in space 12. ♂ upperside blue areas confined to basal halves of spaces 1b, 2 and 3 and lower half of cell on forewing and almost to cell on hindwing. ♀ upperside violet blue with rather narrow borders. ... Arhopala anella
couplets.b_text: Underside markings much darkened. Forewing with a costal spot in space 12, as well as two spots in each of spaces 9, 10 and 11. Hindwing spot mid-space 7 outlined whitish. ♂ upperside lustrous violet blue, forewing border 2.0 mm at tornus increasing to 4.0 mm at apex. ♀ shining blue, border wider. Fwl 17.0 mm. ... Arhopala abseus
couplets.hint: A. anella (Yes) vs A. abseus (Aberrant Oakblue, No). anella is larger (20–26 mm) with underside markings not strongly darkened and no forewing costal spot in space 12. abseus is smaller (~17 mm) with much-darkened markings, a space-12 costal spot, and its mid-space-7 hindwing spot whitish-ringed. Forewing length 20.0–26.0 mm — not judgeable from a field photo.

leads.1: Hindwing without white-tipped tail at the end of vein 3. Underside hindwing without spot at the base of space 1a.
leads.2: Underside forewing with cell spots outlined greenish silver. (centaurus group). Hindwing cell short, much less than half the wing in both sexes.
leads.3: Underside forewing postdiscal band continuous and costal spot in space 10 present.
leads.4: Hindwing tornus rounded, tornal lobe vestigial. ♂ upperside violet blue, border a thread; ♀ purple-blue. Fwl 28-29 mm. ... Arhopala centaurus
leads.5: Hindwing with tornal lobe. ♂ upperside shining blue, tinged with violet towards the wing apices; forewing border a thread at tornus increasing to 1.0 mm at apex. ♀ blue. Fwl 27 mm. Sumatra and Java. ... Arhopala araxes
leads.6: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 4 shifted outwards out of line with those above and below it; no costal spot in space 10; dark patch under cell in upper part of space 1a extends to postdiscal band. ♂ upperside shining blue with broad borders 3.0 mm wide at the forewing tornus increasing to 5.0 mm at apex. ♀ lighter blue. Fwl 27.0 mm. South Myanmar. ... Arhopala amantes
leads.7: Hindwing cell about half length of wing or longer. Underside forewing cell spots not outlined greenish silver.
leads.8: Underside both wings with a bar at end of cell.
leads.9: Underside hindwing postdiscal spots in spaces 7, 6 and 5 in echelon, and with their centres more or less in line; the spot in space 6 nearer the spot in space 5 than the end-cell bar (except in epimuta and agesilaus groups).
leads.10: Underside forewing with a subcostal spot above central cell spot in mid-space 11 and/or at base of space 10.
leads.11: Hindwing tailless. ♂♀ upperside alike; shining, rather powdery blue, with forewing border about 1.5 mm at tornus expanding to mid-costa, and hindwing border 1.5 mm. Fwl 18.0-23.0 mm. (agesias group).
leads.12: Underside forewing without postdiscal band. ... Arhopala similis
leads.13: Underside forewing postdiscal band present, as usual.
leads.14: Underside hair brown, spots rounded; forewing with single spot in space 11. ... Arhopala agesias
leads.15: Underside with large, blackish brown markings; on forewing postdiscal spot in space 3 elongate and touching end-cell bar; on hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 elongate and overlapping end-cell bar. Forewing with two spots in space 11. ... Arhopala kinabala
leads.17: Underside forewing without spot at base of space 10; hindwing with a spot at base of space 6. ♂ upperside pale blue with the forewing border running along the costa to the base. Fwl 23.0 mm. (ijanensis group). ... Arhopala ijanensis
leads.18: Underside forewing with a spot at base of space 10; hindwing without spot at base of space 6.
leads.19: Underside forewing postdiscal band only partially dislocated at vein 4. (anthelus group).
leads.20: Underside forewing with three spots in space 11; hindwing with two spots at base of space 8. ♂ upperside brilliant shining blue with narrow border. ♀ violet blue. Fwl 28.0 mm. (anthelus group; anthelus subgroup). ... Arhopala anthelus
leads.21: Underside forewing without spots in space 11; hindwing with only a single spot at base of space 8, as usual. ♂ upperside shining dark blue, border 0.5 mm. Fwl 22.0 mm. (anthelus group; achelous subgroup)....Arhopala achelous
leads.22: Underside forewing with the postdiscal band completely dislocated at vein 4, with the spots in spaces 4, 5 and 6 in line and oblique. ♂ upperside shining, pale silvery blue overlaid violet towards costa and termen of both wings; border a thread. ♀ violet blue. Fwl 30.0 mm. (camdeo group, camdeo subgroup).... Arhopala anarte
leads.23: Underside forewing without spot above central cell spot in spaces 11 and 10 (except rarely in space 10 in A. hellada and A. aedias).
leads.24: Underside forewing with a dark area under the cell outwardly defined by a pale line normally stretching right across space 1b; often with a spot at extreme base of space 3.
leads.25: Underside hindwing without spot mid-space 8 nor at extreme base of space 6.
leads.26: Underside forewing postdiscal band continued into space 9. Sexual dimorphism marked.
leads.27: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 4 in line, or on an even curve, with the spots in spaces 5 and 6.
leads.28: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 9 in continuation of those in spaces 4, 5 and 6. Hindwing tail short, about 1.5 mm long. ♂ upperside pale, metallic, silvery blue, with forewing border a thread at tornus increasing to 1.0 mm at apex. ♀ pale sky blue. Fwl 20.0 mm. ...Arhopala varro
leads.29: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 9 shifted basad out of line with those in spaces 4, 5 and 6. Tail long, about 4-6 mm.
leads.30: Underside ground colour mostly white. ♂ ♀ pale greyish blue, whitish about end-cell. Fwl 25.0 mm. ...Arhopala dispar
leads.31: Underside uniform grey brown to hair brown.
leads.32: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 smaller than that in space 7; central spot in space 1b elongate; lower half of end-cell bar enlarged outwards.
leads.33: ♂ upperside rather pale, clear violet blue, forewing border 0.5 mm, scarcely increasing towards the apex. ♀ pale purple blue, hindwing border narrow. Fwl 21.0 mm....Arhopala camdana
leads.34: ♂ upperside deep, dull bluish purple, forewing border increasing to 1.25 mm at apex. ♀ purple, whitish at end-cell. Fwl 28.0 mm....Arhopala semperi
leads.35: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 as large as, or larger than, the spot in space 7; central spot in space 1b not unusually elongate; lower end of end-cell bar not often enlarged outwards. ♂ upperside pale violet blue with a greyish tinge, border a thread. ♀ darker blue. Fwl 22.0-26.0 mm. ...Arhopala opalina
leads.36: Underside forewing with postdiscal spot in space 4 shifted distad out of line with spots in spaces 5 and 6. Hindwing tail short, about 2.5 mm. ♂ upperside shining violet blue, border a thread. ♀ purplish blue. Fwl 28.0 mm. ...Arhopala hellada
leads.37: Underside forewing postdiscal band ends at vein 7. ♂ ♀ upperside alike, with broad borders expanding on forewing to about 5.0 mm at costa. Fwl 18.0-20.0 mm.
leads.38: Hindwing with a short tail. Upperside violet blue. ...Arhopala johoreana
leads.39: Hindwing tailless. Upperside much paler blue, tinged violet.... Arhopala belphoebe
leads.40: Underside hindwing either with a spot mid-space 8 or at extreme base of space 6.
leads.41: Underside hindwing without spot mid-space 8. Underside crimson brown with markings outlined by white striae; hindwing central and outer spots in space 7 conjoined at their upper ends. (camdeo group; myrzala subgroup).
leads.42: Hindwing tailed. ♂ upperside border narrow. Fwl 21.0 mm. ... Arhopala myrzala
leads.43: Hindwing tailless. ♂ upperside forewing border 1.5 mm at tornus expanding to 4.0 mm at costa. ♀ similar. Fwl 16.0 mm. ... Arhopala myrzalina
leads.44: Underside hindwing with spot mid-space 8; without spot at extreme base of space 6. Underside purple brown with markings outlined by whitish striae; hindwing central and outer spots in space 7 separate. ♂ upperside dark violet blue, border regular, 2.0 mm wide. (camdeo group; bazaloides subgroup). ... Arhopala bazaloides
leads.45: Underside hindwing with the postdiscal spot in space 6 overlapping, or closer to, the spot in space 5 than to the end-cell bar.
leads.46: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 4 shifted distad out of line with the spots in spaces 5 and 6.
leads.47: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 nearer to the postdiscal spot in space 5 than to the end-cell bar. ♂ upperside forewing no contrasting discal patch.
leads.48: Hindwing tailless. Underside spots small and rounded; nearly always with a spot at extreme base of space 6 on the hindwing. ♂ upperside rich, shining violet blue, border a thread. ♀ deep blue. Fwl 19.0 mm. (hypomuta group). ... Arhopala hypomuta
leads.49: Hindwing tailed. Underside hindwing without spot at base of space 6. ♂ upperside lustrous violet blue, border a thread. ♀ purple blue. Occurs in two forms: large, fwl 25.0-29.0 mm; small, fwl 20.0-22.0 mm. (aedias group). ... Arhopala aedias
leads.50: Underside hindwing postdiscal spot in space 6 placed about midway between the spot in space 5 and the end-cell bar. ♂ upperside forewing with a discal patch contrasting feebly with the rest of the wing. (epimuta group).
leads.51: Hindwing tailless. Fwl 22.0 mm. ... Arhopala epimuta
leads.53: ♂ upperside forewing discal patch large, oval, extending to apex of cell and almost to vein 1; border a thread. Fwl 22.0 mm. ... Arhopala atosia
leads.54: ♂ upperside forewing discal patch smaller, almost confined to the bases of spaces 2 and 3, border increasing to about 1.0 mm at apex. Underside markings better defined and darker than in A. atosia. Fwl 19.0-21.0 mm. ... Arhopala lurida
leads.55: Underside forewing postdiscal spot in space 4 in continuation of the spots in spaces 5 and 6 (occasionally slightly shifted out in amphimuta group, muta subgroup).
leads.56: Underside hindwing with the postdiscal spot in space 6 roughly mid-way between the spot in space 5 and the end-cell bar. Hindwing tailless. (agesilaus group).
leads.57: Underside forewing with basal cell spot, as usual. ♂ upperside rich violet blue; forewing border 2.0 mm at tornus increasing to 4.0 mm at apex. ♀ bluer. Fwl 20.0 mm. ... Arhopala agesilaus
leads.58: Underside forewing without basal cell spot. ♂ upperside very dark bluish violet; border about 1.0 mm at tornus increasing to 2.0 mm at apex. ♀ purple. Fwl 16.0 mm. ... Arhopala avatha
leads.59: Underside hindwing with the postdiscal spot in space 6 overlapping, or closer to, the spot in space 5 than to the end-cell bar.
leads.61: Forewing apex acute and termen straight between veins 2 and 4. Underside forewing postdiscal band sinuous or slightly dislocated at vein 4; hindwing postdiscal spots in spaces 7 and 6 narrow and roughly rectangular. ♂ upperside dark purple with forewing border 0.5 mm at tornus expanding to 1.5 mm at apex. ♀ dark, shining blue. Fwl 22.0 mm. (oenea group). ... Arhopala allata
leads.62: Forewing rounded. Underside forewing postdiscal band nearly completely dislocated at vein 4; hindwing postdiscal spots in spaces 7 and 6 more or less rounded. ♂ upperside deep violet, with narrow regular border. ♀ purple. Fwl 20.0 mm. (amphimuta group, amphimuta subgroup).... Arhopala delta
leads.64: Hindwing cilia with a small white spot in space 1a and a very weak tooth at vein 2. ♂ valva unilobate.
leads.65: Underside hindwing postdiscal band partially dislocated at vein 2
leads.66: ♂ upperside forewing border regular, under 1.0 mm wide.
leads.67: ♂ upperside shining blue to violet blue, border a thread. ♀ hindwing border narrow, usually only about 1.0 mm between veins 2 and 6. Wings quadrate. Fwl 18.0-22.0 mm. ... Arhopala moolaiana
leads.68: ♂ upperside dark bluish purple, border 0.5 mm. ♀ purple, hindwing border at least 2.0 mm wide. Fwl 21.0-25.0 mm. Very difficult to separate from A. amphimuta without dissection of male genitalia. Borneo. ... Arhopala dajagaka
leads.69: ♂ upperside forewing border expands from 2.0 mm at tornus to 3.0 mm at apex. Fwl 20.0-21.0 mm. Distinguished from A. major by presence of a small white patch on hindwing cilia just above tornal lobe and by less rounded postdiscal spots. ... Arhopala norda
leads.70: Underside hindwing postdiscal band more or less dislocated at vein 2. ♂ upperside dark violet blue, forewing border 0.75 mm at tornus expanding to 1.25 mm at apex. ♀ purple with large black borders but not yet recorded in the Malay Peninsula. Fwl 18.0-20.0 mm. ... Arhopala sceva
leads.71: Hindwing cilia with white spot in space 1a absent or, rarely, present but very obscure.
leads.72: Hindwing cilia very weakly toothed at vein 2; postdiscal band partially dislocated at vein 2.
leads.73: ♂ valva unilobate. ♂ upperside very dark purple blue, border 0.5 mm. ♀ purple blue, borders narrower than usual. Fwl 18.0-20.0 mm. Very difficult to separate from small individuals of A. amphimuta without dissection of male genitalia. Borneo. ... Arhopala baluensis
leads.75: ♂ upperside dark bluish purple, border 0.5-1.0 mm. ♀ bluer. Fwl 20.0-23.0 mm. ... Arhopala amphimuta
leads.76: ♂ upperside violet blue, forewing border 2.0 mm at tornus expanding to 3.0 mm at apex. ♀ bluer than amphimuta. Fwl 20.0-21.0 mm. ... Arhopala major
leads.77: Hindwing cilia without a trace of a tooth at vein 2.
leads.78: Underside hindwing postdiscal band partially dislocated at vein 2 (but character not absolutely constant in A. alica).
leads.79: ♂ upperside shining blue with a slight violet tinge, border 1.0 mm. ♀ paler blue, all borders narrower than usual. Fwl 16.0-17.0 mm. ... Arhopala zylda
leads.80: ♂ upperside dark, dull purple, border a thread. ♀ purple. Fwl 17.0 mm. Borneo. ... Arhopala alica
